CustomMetadata.label: UA-001 - Custom profile with Modify All

values.value: Custom profile with Modify All Data

A non-System-Administrator profile has PermissionsModifyAllData=true. Any user assigned this profile gains full read/write/delete access on all records in the org, bypassing all sharing rules and object permissions.
Any user gains full read/write on all org data. A compromised account with this profile can extract, modify, or delete every record in the org with no restriction.

Remove PermissionsModifyAllData from the profile. Use scoped object permissions (CRUD per object) to grant only the access the profile needs. Only the System Administrator profile should carry this permission.
